sections.paragraph:
Original: בּעה בּעא

Transliteration: be‛â' be‛âh

Phonetic: beh-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to ask, seek, request, desire, pray, make petition
    1. (Peal)
      1. to ask, request
      2. to seek (for favour)

Origin: corresponding to H1158

TWOT entry: 2635

Part(s) of speech: Verb
